import redis.asyncio as redis
import json
import hashlib
from typing import Optional
from app.services.sentiment.score_calculator import SentimentResult

REDIS_URL = "redis://localhost:6379"

async def get_cached_score(location_hash: str) -> Optional[dict]:
    r = redis.from_url(REDIS_URL)
    data = await r.get(f"sentiment:{location_hash}")
    return json.loads(data) if data else None

async def cache_score(location_hash: str, result: dict) -> None:
    r = redis.from_url(REDIS_URL)
    # TTL: 24 hours
    await r.setex(f"sentiment:{location_hash}", 86400, json.dumps(result))

def generate_location_hash(destination: str, lat: float, lng: float) -> str:
    # Rounding coordinates to ~1km precision to improve cache hits
    lat_r = round(lat, 2)
    lng_r = round(lng, 2)
    payload = f"{destination.lower()}:{lat_r}:{lng_r}"
    return hashlib.md5(payload.encode()).hexdigest()[:12]
